title: woodsiopsis cystopteroides
intro: Woodsiopsis cystopteroides, also known as the Cystopteris fern or Bladder Fern, is a species of fern in the family Cystopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Woodsiopsis cystopteroides include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Woodsiopsis cystopteroides can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and teas, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
